'''Grizzid''' was [[Gender/Legends|male]]<ref name="CSWE" /> [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]]<ref name="Boy" /> and a notorious [[free-trader]] and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]].<ref name="CSWE" /> He was hired by the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] merchant [[Grendu]] to transport a [[Jabba's rancor/Legends|rancor]] from the [[Tarsunt system/Legends|Tarsunt system]]. However, the [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]] [[Death/Legends|killed]] Grizzid and his crew and his ship crashed on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. The ship was discovered by the [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] [[Tteel Kkak]],<ref name="Boy" /> who sold the location of the wreck to [[Bidlo Kwerve/Legends|Bidlo Kwerve]], a servant of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]].<ref name="Rancor">{{WEGCite|story=A Rancor Comes to Tatooine|book=The Star Wars Sourcebook|reprint=1}}</ref>
